creator: lioux@linf.unb.br
text:
Just a version update form 0.9.2 to 1.0.

Fix: -DISTNAME=      t1lib-0.9.2
+DISTNAME=      t1lib-1.0
 CATEGORIES=    devel
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SUNSITE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    libs/graphics

 MAINTAINER=    ijliao@csie.nctu.edu.tw

-WRKSRC=                ${WRKDIR}/T1-0.9.2
+WRKSRC=                ${WRKDIR}/T1-1.0

 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 USE_GMAKE=     yes
How-To-Repeat: Just compile
